name: Failed Raid
text: Enforcement agents arrived at a suspected site with a warrant, but the facility's legal team obtained a 72-hour injunction before entry. Operators used the window to wipe storage and transfer critical hardware off-site. When inspectors finally entered, the building was empty.
image-prompt: Law enforcement officers in tactical gear standing outside a locked industrial building, a lawyer in a suit blocking the entrance holding up documents, tension between the two groups, harsh daylight, digital painting, no text
